title: Beilschmiedia dinklagei
taxonomy: Beilschmiedia dinklagei is a species of plant that belongs to the family Lauraceae. It is a member of the genus Beilschmiedia, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The genus Beilschmiedia is further classified under the order Laurales, a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive flowers and leaves. Beilschmiedia dinklagei is a part of the class Magnoliopsida, also known as flowering plants. The classification of Beilschmiedia dinklagei is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Laurales, family Lauraceae, genus Beilschmiedia, species B. dinklagei.
